channel.title: linux on josde.me
channel.description: Recent content in linux on josde.me

item.title: Things not to do on a Wii
item.description: During the last few days, I’ve gone on a trip down a very deep rabbit hole: trying to find things to do with the Wii that I have just lying around. I documented my findings, and reviewed everything I tried, just so you won’t have to go down the same hole as I did. Requirements A SD card, at least bigger than 1 GB but higher is recommended. SDXC is not compatible.
